entities.name: SUBSISTENCE FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Food systems that feed resource-poor populations and may have nutrient limitations

entities.name: ESSENTIAL NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Nutrients required for the health of humans and animals

entities.name: NUTRIENT LIMITATIONS
entities.description: The lack of essential nutrients in subsistence food systems

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS
entities.description: Strategies involving crop combinations and external mineral supply to improve nutrition

entities.name: BREEDING STAPLES
entities.description: The process of breeding staple crops to enhance their nutritional balance

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a food system to be maintained in a sound agronomic and societal way

entities.name: CROP NUTRITION
entities.description: The balance of nutrients within crops, which affects productivity

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield or output

entities.name: NUTRIENT-DENSE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that provide a high concentration of essential nutrients

entities.name: VITAMINS
entities.description: Essential micronutrients required by humans and animals

entities.name: SELENIUM
entities.description: An essential micronutrient required by humans and animals

entities.name: IODINE
entities.description: An essential micronutrient required by humans and animals

entities.name: HUMANS
entities.description: People dependent on subsistence food systems

entities.name: ANIMALS
entities.description: Livestock dependent on subsistence food systems

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: The state of lacking essential micronutrients in the diet

entities.name: HARVESTPLUS CHALLENGE PROGRAM
entities.description: A program aimed at eliminating micronutrient deficiencies in resource-poor countries

entities.name: RESOURCE-POOR COUNTRIES
entities.description: Countries where resource-poor populations rely on subsistence food systems
